mapper.sql: id, article_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article_favorite (id, article_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article_favorite SET updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blog_article_favorite SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
